title: Active-site residues as surface
prompt: Load hen egg-white lysozyme (1LYZ), keep the backbone as cartoon, and render the two catalytic residues Glu35 and Asp52 on chain A as a molecular surface.
notes: Tests domain knowledge: lysozyme catalytic dyad is Glu35/Asp52. Grader gives partial credit if the model gets the chain/residues but the wrong surface flavour.
